content: Lydia: By Dibella's tits, what's a furball like you doing in these ruins? Shouldn't you be peddling moon sugar back in Elsweyr? J'zargo: J'zargo finds this Nord's words as dull as her sword. Khajiit magic could melt that frozen Whiterun brain of hers if J'zargo cared to try. Lydia: Hah! Your pathetic sparks couldn't even make my nipples hard, kitten. MJR's lightning spells make me squirt just watching them. J'zargo: J'zargo has seen stronger spells from milk-drinking apprentices. Though J'zargo wonders... does the Dragonborn need this loud brute when he has skilled mages to warm his bed? Lydia: Careful, fur-fucker. MJR likes his women obedient and tight - not some scrawny cat who probably fucks like a skeever in heat. J'zargo: J'zargo's claws could teach this she-wolf new tricks between her legs. But alas, J'zargo prefers partners who don't smell of mead and failure.

Lydia: Ugh, I’d rather let a frost troll rut me raw than listen to another word from a flea-bitten spell-slinger. Let’s go find MJR before he gets ambushed by those bandit whores again. J'zargo: J'zargo would rather test his flame scrolls on his own fur than waste more breath on this raging she-bear. Perhaps next time, she will bring a wit to match her sword.
